ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "date_of_employment" TEXT /* Date of employment */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's manager */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the employee */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the employee belongs to */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey response */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who completed the survey */,
  "survey_completion_date" TEXT /* Date the survey was completed */,
  "survey_type" TEXT /* Type of the survey */,
  "self_employed" TEXT /* Whether the employee is self-employed */,
  "family_history" TEXT /* Whether the employee has a family history of mental health issues */,
  "seek_treatment" TEXT /* Whether the employee is seeking treatment */,
  "work_interference" TEXT /* How often the employee's work is interfered with by mental health issues */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_environment" (
  "work_environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work environment */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who works in this environment */,
  "industry_type" TEXT /* Type of industry the company operates in */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the company */,
  "work_life_balance" TEXT /* Work-life balance of the employee */,
  "employees_num" TEXT /* Number of employees in the work environment */,
  "remote_working" TEXT /* Whether the employee works remotely */,
  "technology_company" TEXT /* Whether the company is a technology company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("work_environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_environment_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_factors" (
  "health_factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health factor */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who experiences this health factor */,
  "physical_activity_level" TEXT /* Level of physical activity */,
  "sleep_quality" TEXT /* Quality of sleep */,
  "nutrition_habits" TEXT /* Nutrition habits */,
  "company_benefits" TEXT /* Whether the company offers benefits */,
  "healthcare_options" TEXT /* Whether the employee has access to healthcare options */,
  "wellness_program" TEXT /* Whether the company offers wellness programs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_factors_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who has access to this resource */,
  "counseling_services" TEXT /* Availability of counseling services */,
  "employee_assistance_programs" TEXT /* Availability of employee assistance programs */,
  "mental_health_days" TEXT /* Availability of mental health days */,
  "resources" TEXT /* Whether the employee has access to resources */,
  "anonymity" TEXT /* Whether the employee's anonymity is maintained */,
  "medical_leave" TEXT /* Whether the employee has access to medical leave */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "consequences" (
  "consequence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consequence */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who experiences this consequence */,
  "work_performance" TEXT /* Impact on work performance */,
  "relationships" TEXT /* Impact on relationships */,
  "overall_wellbeing" TEXT /* Impact on overall well-being */,
  "mental_consequence" TEXT /* Whether the employee experiences mental health consequences */,
  "physical_consequence" TEXT /* Whether the employee experiences physical health consequences */,
  "discuss_coworkers" TEXT /* Whether the employee discusses their issues with coworkers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consequences_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supervisor_discussion" (
  "supervisor_discussion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discussion */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who had this discussion */,
  "discussion_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of discussions with supervisors */,
  "discuss_supervisor" TEXT /* Whether the employee discusses their issues with their supervisor */,
  "mental_interview" TEXT /* Whether the employee has a mental health interview */,
  "physical_interview" TEXT /* Whether the employee has a physical health interview */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supervisor_discussion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supervisor_discussion_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mental_vs_physical" (
  "mental_vs_physical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mental vs. physical health comparison */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who experiences this comparison */,
  "self_rated_mental_health" TEXT /* Self-rated mental health */,
  "self_rated_physical_health" TEXT /* Self-rated physical health */,
  "mental_vs_physical" TEXT /* Whether the employee's mental health is prioritized over physical health */,
  "observed_consequence" TEXT /* Whether the employee observes consequences of prioritizing mental health */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mental_vs_physical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mental_vs_physical_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_results" (
  "analytics_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics result */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey response */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analytics */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation based on the result */,
  "recommendation_category" TEXT /* Category of the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_results_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey question */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the survey question */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of the survey question */,
  "question_category" TEXT /* Category of the survey question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey response */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the response belongs to */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the response answers */,
  "response" TEXT /* Text of the survey response */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the response was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES survey_questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "department_head" INTEGER /* ID of the department head */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)
